---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for AskElira
title: "[Feature] "
labels: feature-request
assignees: ''
---

## Use Case

Describe the problem or need this feature addresses. Who benefits and in what scenario?

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why is the proposed solution preferred?

## Additional Context

Any mockups, examples, references, or links that help illustrate the request.

## Willingness to Contribute

- [ ] I'm willing to submit a PR for this feature
